chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-968 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.9932/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.9933/2025 (Return of surety) 17.11.2025 None present for the applicant/surety Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that vide Order dated 14.9.2022, the applicant/accused S.M Zeeshan was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, vide Order dated 03.10.2022, the instant bail application was dismissed and the interim bail granted to the applicant/accused was recalled. Subsequently vide Judgment dated 27.5.2025, the applicant/accused was acquitted of the charge by the learned trial Court, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
